changeSet.author: ahri-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Snapshot source department storage before transfer into biorepository

changeSet.author: ahri-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Allow rejected biorepository transfers to be recorded in chain of custody
changeSet.sql:
ALTER TABLE clinlims.chain_of_custody_log DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_custody_log_action;
ALTER TABLE clinlims.chain_of_custody_log ADD CONSTRAINT chk_custody_log_action CHECK (custody_action IN ( 'TRANSFER_INITIATED', 'TRANSFER_RECEIVED', 'TRANSFER_REJECTED', 'STORAGE_ASSIGNED', 'STORAGE_MOVED', 'CHECKOUT_REQUESTED', 'CHECKOUT_APPROVED', 'CHECKOUT_RETRIEVED', 'CHECKOUT_RELEASED', 'RETURN_INITIATED', 'RETURN_RECEIVED', 'RETURN_INSPECTED', 'RETURN_STORED', 'DISPOSED' ));
